Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: EL MUNDO DE ROSIE

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger is a colorful and exciting 3D animated show full of music, dancing, and fun adventures! It follows BarryTiger and his lovable friends as they play, learn, and discover new things every day. With happy songs, cheerful characters, and amazing places to visit, each episode brings smiles and laughter. The music is made by real musicians, so every tune is catchy and sounds great! Get ready to sing along, move to the beat, and have a roaring good time with BarryTiger!

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

Holly falls in love with Mario and tries to marry him.

Biggie D, Himari and Gronk devise an elaborate plan to sneak into the museum to save their friend.

Unfortunately, Queenie is too big to go through it and the Shaq Paq have to find a way to cheer her up. / Klaus is boasting and bragging about all the races he won and that he is the fastest car in the world. Gronk bets Klaus that he could beat him in a race, but when the track turns out to be an off road adventure, Klaus learns a valuable lesson in humility.

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Scratch and Grounder fiddle with Robotnik's Warpinating Warpifier and send Sonic and Tails into the world of a Mobius Fairy Tales book.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When a blizzard hits Knothole causing Dulcy to demolish a few huts during a landing, Sonic is forced to bunk with Antoine. // During a rainstorm, Rotor is putting the finishing touches on his new female robot assistant, named Ro-Becca.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra

That means leaving behind the rest of the Shane Gang-as well as all of Eli's slugs, and the ultra-powerful Elementals! Pronto vows to keep the Elementals safe, but proves so annoying that they run-er, hop-away!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Upon returning to the Outlaws' jungle camp, the Shane Gang suffer a sneak attack from the Emperor's Underlord Holt, who steals almost all of their slugs and loads them onto the Dragon Train for transport to the Emperor. With precious few slugs to use as ammo, the Shane Gang must be extra resourceful to get them back.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.desc: Luis debe recurrir a remedios extremos para poder continuar con su labor de venta. Rocco está dispuesto a fugarse de la prisión.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: El abuelo de Benito llega al edificio para tomarse la foto familiar. Germán encuentra a un equipo de niños con quien hacer la reta de fútbol.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico roba a su amigo Flavio y es encerrado Federica es llevada a la estación de policías a declarar unos ladrones entran a la casa de la familia Peluche.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: La familia Peluche va al supermercado y luchan por un lugar de estacionamiento. Federica se pone celosa de que Ludovico habla gustosamente con la señorita de la carnicería.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica intenta seducir a Ludovico pero él no se da cuenta y ella llora porque perdieron la llama de la pasión. Ludovico y Federica buscan como reavivar su matrimonio y hacen un juego de cambio de personalidad.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: El novio de Bibi, Manuel, la invita a Valle del Nabo a pasar el fin de semana. La familia de Bibi los alcanza en casa de Manuel. Manuel termina con Bibi por ser amargada y rara.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: La familia P. Luche festeja el Día de las Madres de una manera muy particular. Ludovico intenta componer el baño pero un plomero muy guapo lo ayudará.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Santos busca cualquier pretexto para estar cerca de Lupita y ella se pone nerviosa. Mía encuentra a Miguel y Romina juntos en su habitación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pilar le llama a Mía de forma anónima para que descubra que Celina le mintió. Mía deja a Miguel afuera de su casa bajo la lluvia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol y Pilar planean incluir a Celina en su nuevo grupo de popularidad. Lupita no quiere que Lola descubra que salió con Santos. Diego golpea a Santos. Sol termina su relación con Diego, y Agustina con Giovanni. José amenaza con golpear a Raquel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía ve un video y se da cuenta que Celina le ha estado mintiendo para salir con un chico. León le advierte a Diego que tiene que ganar las elecciones sí o sí, o lo castigará.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía cuestiona a Celina por no decirle que anda con Alex. Es el día de la votación y gana Diego, pero José está segura de que hicieron fraude. Roberta trata de quejarse pero la castigan y Reverte la consuela, mientras Alma los ve de manera extraña.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel está muy enfermo y Mía lo cuida a pesar de todos los problemas que tienen. Diego engaña a Roberta para llevarla a su departamento y hablar con ella.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Romina se queda a cuidar a Miguel. Gandía pide a Diego, Giovanni y Tomás que encuentren al ladrón de su pluma. Miguel va a la escuela y Gastón lo corre, así que se esconde. Teo va al desfile de las Top Girls y se pelea con José.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Evaristo le advierte a Soledad que Ramiro puede descubrir que ella esconde a Ana Lucía. Isidro le pide a Soledad la mano de Ana Lucía.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Soledad le hace creer a Ana Lucía que está enferma y debe tratarse en la capital. Evaristo le confiesa a Ana Leticia que Marcelo está vivo. Soledad y Ana Lucía llegan a vivir a la pensión de Remedios.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Lucía y Santiago se reencuentran, pero Soledad se opone a su relación. Ramiro le confiesa a Ana Laura que la ama y quiere casarse con ella, pero lo rechaza al creer que solo la quiere por lástima.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Laura cree que Ramiro solo la quiere por interés. Ana Lucía le revela a Santiago el significado de su tatuaje.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Doña Francisca accede a llevar la carta de Camila. Santiago logra caminar. Antillano roba otro barco. Rita rompe la carta de Camila. Timoteo le dice a Camila que se casen y ella le pide ayuda a Lisabeta.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Francisca le dice a Camila que la ayudará a huir. Camila logra escapar de la casa, pero Timoteo la encuentra y se la lleva.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Santiago llega al puerto con Vasco, pero no averiguan nada sobre Camila. Timoteo le da dos opciones a Camila: o la vende a un burdel o se casa con él.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Don Timoteo y Camila se casan. Epifanio le cuenta a Mercedes de la boda y ella le escribe a Ricardo. Alberto le pregunta a Manuela quién es el amante de Úrsula.

programme.title: El Chanfle II
programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.title: El futbolista fenómeno
programme.desc: Un vendedor de cerveza es secuestrado por unos extraterrestres que le otorgan poderes para ser un excelente futbolista.

programme.title: El Cielo y Tú
programme.desc: Un sacerdote sufre de amnesia al ser golpeado en la cabeza y se enamora de una joven con la cual tiene un hijo.

programme.title: El Chanfle
programme.desc: Chanfle Segundo es el utilero de un equipo de fútbol que, a fin de mejorar su situación económica, intenta vender una pistola para pagar los cuidados de su esposa embarazada. Debido a esto, se van creando divertidos enredos.

programme.title: Camino del infierno
programme.desc: Una mujer se enamora de un hombre que tiene un garfio reemplazando su mano y al que abandona cuando cree tener lepra.

programme.title: Bugambilia
programme.desc: La hija (Dolores del Río) de un minero rico se enamora de un pobre galán (Pedro Armendáriz) a quien su padre no acepta.

programme.title: Distinto amanecer
programme.desc: Dos hombres y una mujer se enfrentan a la corrupción política y a sus propias pasiones.

programme.title: Cuando los hijos se van
programme.desc: Raimundo sufre el repudio de su familia por fechorías que no cometió. La única que cree en él es su madre, doña Lupita, una mujer que sufre profundamente a causa de las decisiones equivocadas de sus hijos.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Para qué te metes de payaso si no aguantas las carcajadas
programme.desc: Chicharito tiene 15 años y lleva una doble vida, por la mañana va a la secundaria y por la tarde trabaja de payaso. Mena, niña de 15 años, casi es atropellada por mirar el celular. Chicharito se da cuenta y en una hábil maniobra la salva.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Fabián siempre ha envidiado a su primo Marco. Esta envidia se hace evidente cuando Eduardo, un cazatalentos futbolístico, elige a Marco. Fabián no puede superar el hecho de no ser el elegido e intenta matar a Marco empujándolo a la barranca.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Le salió el tiro por la culata
programme.desc: Dos niños son aficionados de las películas de suspenso y tienen un blog para evidenciar a los vecinos que hacen cosas incorrectas. Los niños son testigos de un delito por el cual uno de sus padres es injustamente llevado a la cárcel.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que nace pa tamal, del cielo le caen las hojas
programme.desc: Azucena es una madre soltera que sufre de Alzheimer y sus hijos deberán enfrentarse a esta terrible enfermedad.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De las palabras no sonido, sino el sentido
programme.desc: Luego del suicidio de una chica, se decide tomar medidas drásticas para prevenir que esto vuelva a suceder.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De ningún laberinto propio se sale con llave ajena
programme.desc: Durante quince años, Carla nunca ha entendido el rechazo de Miguel, situación que la llevó a beber para mitigar su sufrimiento.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: No hay peor lucha que la que no se hace
programme.desc: Una joven vive con su dura y conservadora abuela. Cuando el padre de la joven decide recuperar el tiempo perdido, ella se da cuenta de que su abuela se ha encargado de separarla de su padre y su madre.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Amo de lo que callas, esclavo de lo que dices
programme.desc: La madre de un joven se siente frustrada por su situación económica y decide abandonar a su familia. El joven culpa a su padre por el abandono de su madre y por el complejo que tiene hacia su cuerpo.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: En ausencia de Maria José, Lucero llega como invitada especial tomando el papel de juez. Ernesto D'alessio se mide en el karaoke.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.desc: Pequeños Gigantes llega a su fin con la participación de estrellas como Carlos Ponce, Anahí, Christian Castro y más. Se dará a conocer al equipo vencedor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La muerte de la soldado Vanessa Guillén ha provocado un movimiento nacional para hablar sobre un tema incómodo, la violencia sexual contra las mujeres en las fuerzas armadas dutrante años, los abusos contra ellas han sido una epidemia sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Juan Morales, cansado de estar confinado en una silla de ruedas, decidió desafiar sus límites y se convirtió en el distribuidor de drogas de su escuela. Envuelto en la violencia callejera, Juan logró salir adelante para volverse un psicólogo.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El tiempo parece moverse en cámara lenta para familiares, amigos y conocidos de personas que han sido víctimas de diferentes crímenes que, desgraciadamente, muchas veces no logran ser resueltos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Poco a poco el ser humano termina con el planeta que habita, hoy, el plástico es uno de los mayores enemigos, no se degrada, no desaparece y ahora llena los mares, amenazando su flora y fauna sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Ante la incompetencia de las autoridades, muchos familiares se han convertido en investigadores privados aficionados dispuestos a enfrentar riesgos. Ellos dicen vivir una carrera contra el tiempo para evitar que sus seres queridos desaparezcan.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una banda de asaltantes con armas de juguete se llevó casi veinte millones de dólares de las cajillas de seguridad de un banco, lo sorprendente es que no hubo heridos ni disparos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un hombre habla sobre el infierno que vivió con la desaparición de su esposa, pues no solo sufría por ella al no saber donde estaba, también tuvo que lidiar con el hecho de que se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.desc: "Graduation Playlist" is the perfect soundtrack to capture this special moment. Filled with nostalgic anthems and fresh, upbeat tracks, this playlist celebrates the excitement of closing one chapter and starting a new one. From heartfelt ballads to energetic K-pop hits, each song reflects the memories, goodbyes, and hope for the future that come with graduation. Whether you're walking across the stage or reminiscing about school days, this playlist will make all those graduation vibes feel even more special! programme.title: John McLaughlin & Mahavishnu Orchestra
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1986, the acclaimed jazz fusion group Mahavishnu Orchestra led by guitarist John McLaughlin took the stage at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. This third incarnation of the group featured an outstanding lineup, with Jim Beard on keyboards, Jonas Hellborg on bass, Danny Gottlieb on drums, and Bill Evans on saxophone.

programme.title: Art Farmer
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Charles Bradley
programme.desc: On April 26, 2012, the world-famous vocalist Charles Bradley and his Extraordinaires grace the stage of the Cigale in Paris. Success did not come easily for the American. Before Bradley (1948-2017) even considered a career as a singer, he tried to make ends meet with countless odd jobs. Only in 1996 he finally followed in the footsteps of his great idol, soul icon James Brown. Brown and Bradley shared the talent to bring an audience to ecstasy. With his mix of funk, soul, and R&B, Bradley has developed a sound of his own, in which a keen ear might find a few traces of James Brown.

programme.title: Joe Turner, Kenny Clarke Trio & Art Simmons Trio
programme.desc: This broadcast features performances of pianist Joe Turner, the Kenny Clarke Trio, and the Art Simmons Trio.

programme.title: Coleman Hawkins
programme.desc: A jazz festival named after the inventor of the instrument most associated with the genre, Adolphe Sax, would be incomplete without the man who laid the groundwork for how the instrument is played today. This must have been the reasoning of the organizers of the Festival International de Jazz Adolphe Sax in Dinant, Belgium, when they invited tenor saxophone giant Coleman Hawkins to perform there in June 1962. Appearing with a group that includes the French pianist George Arvanitas, one-time Duke Ellington bassist Jimmy Woode, and expat drummer Kansas Fields, the musician also known as ‘Bean' and ‘Hawk' serves up an hour-long set of familiar standards bookended by Hank Jones' “Chant” and J. J. Johnson's “Wee Dot”.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Muddy Waters, Horace Silver & Dizzy Gillespie
programme.sub-title: H. Silver, M. Waters, D. Gillespie - Newport Jazz
programme.desc: The Newport Jazz Festival, first established in the North-American town of Newport, Rhode Island in the summer of 1954, has now grown to become one of the largest multi-day celebrations of jazz worldwide. It has resulted in numerous famous live albums from top-rate jazz stars, and has spawned several worldwide tours, including editions of the Newport Jazz Festival in Rotterdam, The Netherlands. In 1968, the Newport Jazz Festival in Rotterdam welcomed three talented Americans: pianist Horace Silver, guitarist Muddy Waters, and trumpeter Dizzy Gillespie, alongside their bands.

programme.title: Daniel Harding & Orchestra del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino
programme.sub-title: Brahms Tragic Overture & Mahler Symphony No. 1
programme.desc: The Maggio Musicale Fiorentino (Florence Musical May) is Italy's oldest opera and arts festival. It was founded in 1933 with the aim of presenting contemporary and forgotten operas. Over the years, the scope widened, and orchestral concerts have long been an integral part of the festival. As part of the festival's 2021 edition, maestro Daniel Harding leads the Orchestra del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in a wonderful concert program featuring Johannes Brahms's Tragic Overture in D minor, Op. 81, and Gustav Mahler's Symphony No. 1 in D major, ‘Titan'. Brahms composed his concert overture during the summer of 1880. With its dark and tumultuous character, it could be regarded as the serious counterpart of his more joyful Academic Festival Overture, Op. 80. Mahler completed his first symphony eight years later, in 1888. Originally a five-movement piece, the composer discarded the second movement ‘Blumine' some years later, resulting in the final four-movement version we know today. This performance was recorded at Teatro del Maggio Musicale Fiorentino in Florence, Italy, in 2021.

programme.title: Kevin John Edusei
programme.desc: In October 2020, German conductor Kevin John Edusei made his London Symphony Orchestra debut and leads the orchestra in a beautiful performance of the suite from Mendelssohn's “A Midsummer Night's Dream”, Boulanger's “D'un matin de printemps” and Schumann's 'Spring' Symphony. Edusei is regularly praised for the drama and tension that he brings to his music-making, and for his clear sense of architecture and attention to detail.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Luca Vignali, Angelo De Angelis, Carmine Pinto & Eliseo Smordoni
programme.sub-title: Mozart - Quintet for piano and winds, K. 452
programme.desc: Luca Vignali (oboe), Angelo De Angelis (clarinet), Carmine Pinto (horn), Eliseo Smordoni (bassoon), and Linda Di Carlo (piano) perform Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Quintet for piano and winds in E-flat major, K. 452. The work premiered at the Viennese Burgtheater on April 1, 1784, with the composer himself at the piano. Shortly after the performance, Mozart wrote to his father Leopold, “I consider it the best work I have ever written…”. Striking is the Quintet's unusual instrumentation, which presented the composer with a challenge “as single winds, as opposed to pairs, pose problems of blend”. Therefore, Mozart explored numerous different permutations of instruments to produce various sonorities, and used short phrases and motifs for variety. This performance was recorded at Perugia's Auditorium Santa Cecilia, Italy, on June 23, 2022.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.title: Led Zeppelin
programme.desc: This is a documentary film about the build-up, making, release, and - crucially - music contained on this most revered of albums. With the aid of rare and classic performances, scarce interviews, seldom seen photographs and contributions from those involved in the making of the record - plus the review and critique from a panel of Zeppelin experts - this program finally lifts the lid on what many believe to be Led Zep's very finest offering. With contributions from the album's engineer, Ron Nevison former Yardbird, Chris Dreja Swansong recording artist, Maggie Bell author of The Rough Guide to Led Zeppelin, Nigel Williamson Tight But Loose editor, Dave Lewis Classic Rock Magazine's Malcolm Dome renowned guitar tutor and author, Rikky Rooksby and Robert Plant biographer, Neil Daniels. This is the complete story behind what what Rolling Stone called "their Tommy, Beggar's Banquet and Sgt. Pepper rolled into one".

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Radiohead
programme.sub-title: The King of Limbs: Live from the Basement
programme.desc: The King of Limbs: Live from the Basement is a 2011 live video album by the English alternative rock band Radiohead, performing their eighth album, The King of Limbs (2011).

programme.title: Grunge
programme.desc: Grunge is very loud, very rebellious lots of very heavy guitar and fuzz effects, but in terms of its recording techniques, it's very lo-fi everything is stripped back, and really taken back to just the instruments. The lyrics tended to be about real life stuff, alienation a kind of weariness at the world a cynicism, but also a lot of humour. Grunge was the music of the underdog. There was no point aping glamour because there was no glamour in their lives, and it wasn't something that they could graduate to. So they would sit at home, play riffs, deep, big, huge riffs.

programme.title: Alt Rock
programme.desc: Emerging from the independent music underground of the 1970s it became widely popular in the 1980s. The music was unified by collective debt to the musical style and/or the independent, DIY ethos of punk rock, which laid the groundwork for alternative music. Throughout the 1980s, magazines, college radio airplay, and word of mouth had increased the prominence and highlighted the diversity of alternative rock, and with the breakthrough of Nirvana, grunge and Britpop movements in the 1990s, it entered the mainstream. With Smashing Pumpkins, Jane's Addiction and Soundgarden

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu

programme.title: Islands of Paradise w Music
programme.desc: Transform any TV or digital screen into a window to the beautiful Yasawa islands of Fiji, with this one hour-long, soothing visual journey. Palm trees, tropical lagoons, birds chirping, waves lapping, golden sunsets and fiery sunrises are just a few of the scenes in store for the viewer. Enjoy nearly all the benefits of a relaxing tropical vacation from the comfort of your home!

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Replace your worries with wonder as you journey into the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins in this new 1-hour long film. "Dolphin Voyage Relaxation" is 1-hour long and features some spectacular underwater cinematography by Peter Schneider and a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, calming ambient music by The Cynic Project, and a subtle background layer of harmonically tuned binaural relaxation sounds by Schmidt. The result is an immersive, awe-inspiring adventure with gracefully transitions, leaving the viewer with a powerful dose of calm and healing energy direct from Nature.

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Head to Newfoundland's Amherst Cove to admire the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches (Music)
programme.desc: Experience the beautiful beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: Turn any screen into a window the the Greek Islands with this immensely relaxing HD visual journey through the unique and beautiful coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island. Slowly awaken your senses as the morning sun rises over the sea, and watch as day slowly passes into dusk. Distant waves break and birds chirp adding an a nice ambient music that combines to create a video that's so relaxing it's almost trance-inducing.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast 1
programme.desc: A 5 hour long ambient nature film featuring the spectacular sights and sounds of the legendary 11-mile long Kalalau Trail. Featuring hundreds of breathtaking yet tranquil scenes with stereo audio, this video begins on Kalalau Beach at sunrise and progresses along the trail over the course of nearly a full day. Viewers will enjoy a countless array of views that overlook the vast blue ocean, where an abundance of wildlife and nature appear in their pristine and healing majesty.

programme.title: Te Urewera National Park: New Zealand (Music)
programme.desc: Take in the many views of Te Urewera National Park's falls, from closeups of the rapid cascades to far-away vantages from the park's highest peaks. This magical scenery also includes tree-lined trails and beautiful beach views before dusk.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: A powerful art collection capturing the vibrant essence of queer identities, experiences, and perspectives within the LGBTQ+ community. Bouncing basslines, punchy drum kits, and house-driven melodies add to the atmosphere of freedom and joy.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Explore the mesmerizing world of Varvara Alay, an award-winning graphic designer and illustrator. Her bold colors, surreal motifs, and intricate patterns blend fantasy and realism, creating endlessly fascinating, dreamlike realms filled with elaborate characters and majestic designs.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Step into the surreal world of Greg Noblin, where daydreams and impossibilities take shape. His art weaves slightly vague vignettes, inviting viewers to find their own meaning. Blending whimsy and surrealism, his imaginative works turn the ordinary into something extraordinary.

programme.title: Art Buzz
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Art Buzz
programme.desc: This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Art Buzz
programme.desc: A visual fiesta, radiating the energy of celebration and unity. From intricate depictions of traditional dancers to modern interpretations of iconic symbols, the art encapsulates Mexico's rich history while the music adds to the joyful atmosphere.

programme.title: Seasons of Art: Autumn Harvest 2
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia
